sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ بِتَنَوُّعِ أَطْبَاقِهِ الشَّهِيَّةِ وَالْمَشْهُورَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kuhinja se odlikuje raznolikošću svojih ukusnih i poznatih jela.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cuisine is characterized by the diversity of its delicious and famous dishes.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ تَنَاوُلَ الْحُمُّصِ وَالْفَلَافِلِ فِي وَجْبَةِ الْإِفْطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi vole jesti humus i falafel za doručak.
sentences.translationEn: People like to eat hummus and falafel for breakfast.

sentences.arabic: تُسْتَخْدَمُ التَّوَابِلُ الْمُخْتَلِفَةُ مِثْلُ الْكَمُّونِ وَالزَّعْتَرِ لِإِعْطَاءِ الطَّعَامِ نَكْهَةً خَاصَّةً.
sentences.translation: Različiti začini poput kima i majčine dušice (za'tara) koriste se kako bi hrani dali poseban ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Different spices such as cumin and thyme are used to give the food a special flavor.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ دَائِمًا حَوْلَ الْمَائِدَةِ لِتَنَاوُلِ الْغَدَاءِ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Porodica se uvijek okuplja oko stola kako bi zajedno ručali.
sentences.translationEn: The family always gathers around the table to eat lunch together.
